summary: Frontend-only verification of Print Request button gating fix for migrated MR-prefix design requests. All four requested checks passed for lead 'The Rameshwaram Cafe' (20c97966-ab07-4428-893f-cd5633393eee) logged in as CEO Surya Yadavalli (Sales/Marketing, not Design dept).

verification_results.check: MR-2026-0020 (final_approved, Design dept) shows green Print Request button in Customer Branding on lead detail page
verification_results.evidence: data-testid=create-print-request-btn-09b6d251-7d27-4581-93d2-a4ce38dd2af9 present and visible; button text 'Print Request'

verification_results.check: MR-2026-0017 (submitted, not finalized) does NOT show Print Request button
verification_results.evidence: Only 1 create-print-request-btn-* element on page (belongs to 0020); screenshot confirms 0017 row has no button, only 'Submitted' badge

verification_results.check: Clicking Print Request on MR-2026-0020 opens Create Print Request dialog
verification_results.evidence: role=dialog opened with title 'Create Print Request' and subtitle 'For MR-2026-0020 · Request Bottle Design Concept'. Dialog closed with Escape; no submission performed.

verification_results.check: Regression: /design-requests-new/{id} for MR-2026-0020 still shows Send for Printing (data-testid=mr-send-print-btn)
verification_results.evidence: Button present and visible with text 'Send for Printing'

critical_code_review_comments: Fix in LeadBottleDesigns.js (PRINTABLE_STATE_KEYS + canRaisePrint) correctly mirrors DesignRequestNewDetail.js gating logic (['final_approved','production_in_progress','production_completed'] OR current_state_is_terminal). No isAssignedToMe restriction — matches canonical Send-for-Printing behavior.
seed_data_creation: None; used pre-seeded MR-2026-0020 and MR-2026-0017 on lead 20c97966-ab07-4428-893f-cd5633393eee.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified end-to-end. The Print Request button on migrated MR-prefix design requests now shows for non-Design-department users (CEO) when the request is in final_approved / production_in_progress / production_completed or is in a terminal state. Regression on DRN detail page (Send for Printing) intact. No further action needed on this issue.
